parts.text:
Business: The Bosphorus
Location: 10 Main St, Nutley, NJ 07110
Website: https://bosphorusnutley.com
Persona: Authentic Turkish restaurant with warm hospitality and traditional recipes
Social: {"instagram": "https://instagram.com/bosphorusnutley", "facebook": "https://facebook.com/bosphorusnutley"}

Create a marketing content strategy and draft post for this business.
Platform: Instagram. Creative direction focused on authentic Turkish flavors and warm hospitality. Draft content highlighting traditional dishes and the restaurant's unique story.

Business: Mike's Pastry
Location: 300 Hanover St, Boston, MA 02113
Website: https://mikespastry.com
Persona: Iconic Boston Italian bakery famous for cannoli since 1946
Social: {"instagram": "https://instagram.com/mikespastry"}

Create a marketing content strategy and draft post for this business.
Platform: Instagram. Creative direction celebrating Boston's iconic bakery heritage and the legendary cannoli. Content strategy emphasizing tradition, craftsmanship, and local pride.

Business: Strand Bookstore
Location: 828 Broadway, New York, NY 10003
Website: https://strandbooks.com
Persona: Legendary independent NYC bookstore with 18 miles of books since 1927
Social: {"instagram": "https://instagram.com/strandbooks", "twitter": "https://twitter.com/strandbookstore"}

Create a marketing content strategy and draft post for this business.

Platform: Instagram. Creative direction celebrating literary culture, book discovery, and the Strand's unique New York City identity. Content highlights staff picks, rare finds, and the store's 18 miles of books.
